name: knowledge-sync
description: 双向知识同步（云端 Git + 敏感过滤）

payload.message:
AUTONOMOUS: Run ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/knowledge-sync.sh

If sync fails, check logs at ~/.openclaw/workspace/logs/sync-*.log and resolve conflicts manually.

After sync, optionally run: ~/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/sync-status.sh to verify.
